testcase.name: test_login_returns_session_cookie

failure.message: AssertionError: Response missing 'user' key assert 'user' in {'email': 'ceo@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'CEO ManoProtect', 'picture': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUetlGRQkS3nefqVlcf1oMiDfFCNAM7P0WwpNVaa28aL_AOsD9ZqLEYRSnJTReFdZceAmFCUhjjuG7L_hZoQzlFmdPp2OQlcfUZtnLh1Ync37uyzrTVjqVTw19HdYUzcSbfZLN2AY3Gq_kQ0HDDk_Ra4sjFzSOsKzwFLAatYBD3WG775VBRN2mhI0Vbk-dkbrYPq1u8HK8hBZAuJ78AQ_1IFfZvYDXby1sDeWHGg56oqH7g6SuKGyeV4GMDBkkyP_3HSuMlNkdMO2gDjYndppM068lTOx1f8LihHHdPkxp7fGLSli5bhmbTL4SM27J6IMPTNOKyOwPt0VWsGvr7IDh63ZcZk9U9FZcDUt8MMVxm0lZFEzRKWg_Cc6pJE4t0c-y8Fezt_jb7BR3WY78I4PY-SkIE6GTKayUlsrScChY4gCBZd285wqwOuo6P8yUTOFaFrctioTnJ37lIWdcK0vM_kcZkvuB1d6HeT966nFYBpeO4zwCDH5Z4bfvWAzh8PugWJb1qb2VUYrxq9nrd9CeXr5K5QnoNU44J_rCch6opdpGnfbiAlA7lYpJFLwlKDa9tN_pO6Ho-ua6K7hMX1_3dmPGx8J4mixcmpEiL9mUec6PQDpnBdi3sDWxGM4f5Ssy5YR0xYNxtWd7K9pv9IdZsGxJIvDtMSAAdJsXmW3hDpSeqlZJ0r8fovjtpGSKaxi-74RnKUmxa2DN6kSbRouzTsuGvhEh0psfFJUdDX3lq402iZM0FkrV2ZtvBRiBiGAw1xbBu1iRNjx-T1a4Ntys0d22JEC9saULw0klQRkAWwE8tadZMQvQ1bINea_wavr58dfYNjuNTVMxWyqDo-8elswolQ9e1zZWrF1-2itGN3olhuY4HT1HX1BrwUoKrMVVNUKJAS0n9FTp50-yDHeNkhYKYZ9jKcY-YU5U6zhNYIaG9M9tFyTt4844j9uis_j3-E1UvXirK571zI9A7HvM0jTYBSU-hV2cBUAFI4WlvFou2GQSGMX-pt6T1uBzQfPZ2t6saiP92UVBlVcFKdXEWLF5F1bBI1iQyfQogn8V43JbXW1V2a-Zu=s96-c', 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85_manoconnect.py:42: in test_login_returns_session_cookie assert "user" in data, "Response missing 'user' key" E AssertionError: Response missing 'user' key E assert 'user' in {'email': 'ceo@manoprotect.com', 'name': 'CEO ManoProtect', 'picture': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUetlGRQkS3nefqVlcf1oMiDfFCNAM7P0WwpNVaa28aL_AOsD9ZqLEYRSnJTReFdZceAmFCUhjjuG7L_hZoQzlFmdPp2OQlcfUZtnLh1Ync37uyzrTVjqVTw19HdYUzcSbfZLN2AY3Gq_kQ0HDDk_Ra4sjFzSOsKzwFLAatYBD3WG775VBRN2mhI0Vbk-dkbrYPq1u8HK8hBZAuJ78AQ_1IFfZvYDXby1sDeWHGg56oqH7g6SuKGyeV4GMDBkkyP_3HSuMlNkdMO2gDjYndppM068lTOx1f8LihHHdPkxp7fGLSli5bhmbTL4SM27J6IMPTNOKyOwPt0VWsGvr7IDh63ZcZk9U9FZcDUt8MMVxm0lZFEzRKWg_Cc6pJE4t0c-y8Fezt_jb7BR3WY78I4PY-SkIE6GTKayUlsrScChY4gCBZd285wqwOuo6P8yUTOFaFrctioTnJ37lIWdcK0vM_kcZkvuB1d6HeT966nFYBpeO4zwCDH5Z4bfvWAzh8PugWJb1qb2VUYrxq9nrd9CeXr5K5QnoNU44J_rCch6opdpGnfbiAlA7lYpJFLwlKDa9tN_pO6Ho-ua6K7hMX1_3dmPGx8J4mixcmpEiL9mUec6PQDpnBdi3sDWxGM4f5Ssy5YR0xYNxtWd7K9pv9IdZsGxJIvDtMSAAdJsXmW3hDpSeqlZJ0r8fovjtpGSKaxi-74RnKUmxa2DN6kSbRouzTsuGvhEh0psfFJUdDX3lq402iZM0FkrV2ZtvBRiBiGAw1xbBu1iRNjx-T1a4Ntys0d22JEC9saULw0klQRkAWwE8tadZMQvQ1bINea_wavr58dfYNjuNTVMxWyqDo-8elswolQ9e1zZWrF1-2itGN3olhuY4HT1HX1BrwUoKrMVVNUKJAS0n9FTp50-yDHeNkhYKYZ9jKcY-YU5U6zhNYIaG9M9tFyTt4844j9uis_j3-E1UvXirK571zI9A7HvM0jTYBSU-hV2cBUAFI4WlvFou2GQSGMX-pt6T1uBzQfPZ2t6saiP92UVBlVcFKdXEWLF5F1bBI1iQyfQogn8V43JbXW1V2a-Zu=s96-c', 'plan': 'enterprise', ...}

testcase.name: test_desktop_download_invalid_key
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85_manoconnect.py:199: in test_desktop_download_invalid_key assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got: 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cors_credentials_header

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected allow-credentials: true, got: assert '' == 'true'
- true

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85_manoconnect.py:221: in test_cors_credentials_header assert allow_creds == "true", f"Expected allow-credentials: true, got: {allow_creds}" E AssertionError: Expected allow-credentials: true, got: E assert '' == 'true' E E - true
